name: Prediction Market Arbitrage
description: Exploits mispriced odds between correlated prediction outcomes (e.g. Kalshi vs Polymarket)

parameters.label: Min Spread Threshold ($)
parameters.description: Minimum price discrepancy required to trigger an arbitrage execution signal

parameters.label: Max Contract Size
parameters.description: Maximum number of contracts allowed per leg

parameters.label: Execution Cooldown (s)
parameters.description: Delay between consecutive order execution signals
